join.loadingDescription: We are processing your invitation link.
join.loginRedirectDescription: Please sign in with a magic link. After that, the invitation continues automatically.
join.invalidDescription: This invitation link is no longer valid.
join.acceptFailedDescription: The invitation could not be processed.
join.expiredHint: If the link has expired, please ask the inviting person for a new invitation.

errors.loadFailed: The invitation could not be loaded.

welcome.title: Welcome

existing.title: This invitation is set up for an existing team.
existing.text: The flow focuses more on alignment, roles, tensions, and concrete collaboration in your current day-to-day work.

preFounder.title: This invitation is set up for early matching.
preFounder.text: The flow helps you make expectations, differences, and fit visible before entering closer collaboration.

welcome.profileIntro: Set up your core profile briefly. CoFoundery uses your name, role, focus, and intention so reports, matching, and the workbook can connect cleanly to your profile.
welcome.profileOptional: You can add more profile details later.

statusErrors.emailMismatch: This invitation does not match the email address of your current profile.
statusErrors.alreadyClaimed: This founder slot has already been connected to another profile.
statusErrors.activationFailed: The team connection could not be completed right now. Please try again in a moment.
statusErrors.invalidToken: This founder link is no longer valid or could not be found.

teamInvite.notFoundText: This link is no longer valid or could not be connected to an open team start point.
teamInvite.title: Matching start for two founders
teamInvite.invitedByAdvisor: {advisorName} invited you to start a shared founder matching context in Cofoundery Align.
teamInvite.invitedGeneric: You have been invited to start a shared founder matching context in Cofoundery Align.
teamInvite.intro: Your step is intentionally lightweight: connect your profile, confirm your start, and then wait until {counterpart} has started as well. Only then will your shared flow be activated.
teamInvite.signInText: Sign in with {email} so your founder slot can be connected cleanly.
teamInvite.wrongEmailTitle: Please sign in with the right email
teamInvite.wrongEmailText: This founder slot is intended for {slotEmail}. You are currently signed in as {currentEmail}.
teamInvite.activateText: This link belongs to {email}. Confirm your start in the matching flow with one click.
teamInvite.waitingText: Your slot is already connected. Once {counterpart} has started as well, your shared matching context will activate automatically.

basisComplete.title: Nice. The foundation questionnaire is complete.
basisComplete.intro: That was the larger part. Your progress is safely saved and the next step is clear.
basisComplete.choice: You can now pause briefly or continue directly with the 12 questions in the values module. After that, your part is complete.
basisComplete.reportHint: Almost there: once both of you are done, your matching report is prepared automatically.
basisComplete.continueCard: If you continue now, your full part is completed in one flow.
basisComplete.pauseCard: If you continue later, your current progress stays saved and you can pick up right here.

error.title: Invitation unavailable
error.description: The invitation could not be loaded ({reason}).

reportReady.title: You’re all set.
reportReady.description: Your founder report is ready. You will be redirected in a few seconds and can open it right away.
reportReady.valuesHint: Your matching report based on the foundation profiles is ready. If you continue now, you can add the values module next.
reportReady.completeHint: Foundation profile and, where relevant, values profile are now combined in the shared report.
reportReady.retryHint: The matching report was triggered again while loading ({reason}).

existingProfileLinked.title: Your existing profile is connected.
existingProfileLinked.description: Your already submitted answers now apply to this invitation. Once the other person is done, your matching report will be prepared.
existingProfileLinked.hint: There is nothing else you need to do right now. The dashboard will show you when your shared report is ready.

existingChoice.title: How would you like to start this matching?
existingChoice.description: You already have a submitted profile. For this matching, you can intentionally reuse it or answer again for this specific context.
existingChoice.useExistingText: Use your most recently submitted answers as the matching foundation for this invitation.
existingChoice.refreshText: Start with a fresh run if you want to bring in your current state deliberately.

finalized.title: Great, your part is complete.
finalized.description: Your answers have been saved and your shared founder report has just been prepared. You will be redirected in a few seconds.
finalized.valuesHint: Your matching report is now available. If you add the values module next, the next report state becomes more useful.
finalized.reportHint: This is a good moment to open the report: it makes differences, strengths, and first conversation areas visible.

waiting.title: Great, your part is complete.
waiting.description: Your answers have been saved. Once the other person is done, your founder report will be prepared automatically.
waiting.valuesHint: Your foundation profile is saved. Once the other person has also completed the foundation profile, your matching report will become visible. You can continue with the values module in the meantime.
waiting.dashboardHint: There is nothing else you need to do right now. The dashboard will show you when your shared report is ready.

fallback.title: Questionnaire complete
fallback.description: The report could not be prepared right now ({reason}). Please check the status in the dashboard.
